name: gaokao-advisor
description: Evidence-grounded Gaokao assistant for exam paper and essay retrieval, university and major information, score lines, score-to-rank lookup, and guided volunteer planning.

displayDescription.en: Helps retrieve Gaokao exam papers, essays, university and major information, score lines and score-to-rank data, with guided volunteer form filling and document deliverables.
displayDescription.zh: 辅助检索高考真题、高考作文、全国高校与专业信息，并调用批次线、一分一段能力；同时提供全流程志愿填报引导，产出可转发的腾讯文档志愿报告

defaultInitPrompt.zh: 帮我查一下2024年高考数学真题

quickPrompts.zh: 帮我查一下2024年高考数学真题
福建2024年物理类600分全省排第几？
quickPrompts.en: What is the 2024 Fujian Physics-track rank for a score of 600?

quickPrompts.zh: 广东历史类本科批近三年分数线是多少？
quickPrompts.en: Show Guangdong History-track undergraduate score lines for the past three years

quickPrompts.zh: 我想报志愿，能帮我一步步梳理吗？
quickPrompts.en: I want to fill in my college preferences, can you guide me step by step?
